mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_user where del_flag = '0' and status = '0'
select count(*) from campus_task where del_flag = '0' AND publish_user_id = #{publishUserId}
select count(*) from campus_leave_apply where del_flag = '0' and leave_status = '0' AND approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}
select count(*) from campus_shared_file where del_flag = '0' AND upload_user_id = #{uploadUserId}

select date_format(t.create_time, '%m-%d') as name, count(*) as value from campus_task t where t.del_flag = '0' and t.create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 7 day) AND t.publish_user_id = #{publishUserId} group by date_format(t.create_time, '%m-%d') order by name asc

select r.role_name as name, count(ur.user_id) as value from sys_role r left join sys_user_role ur on r.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_user u on ur.user_id = u.user_id and u.del_flag = '0' where r.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' group by r.role_id, r.role_name order by value desc
select l.leave_status as name, count(*) as value from campus_leave_apply l where l.del_flag = '0' group by l.leave_status

select date_format(l.audit_time, '%m-%d') as date, sum(case when l.leave_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as approved, sum(case when l.leave_status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as rejected from campus_leave_apply l where l.del_flag = '0' and l.leave_status in ('1', '2') and l.audit_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 7 day) AND l.approver_user_id = #{approverUserId} group by date_format(l.audit_time, '%m-%d') order by date asc

select t.task_id, t.task_title, t.task_status, t.priority, t.deadline_time, t.create_time, pu.nick_name as publish_user_name, ru.nick_name as receive_user_name from campus_task t left join sys_user pu on t.publish_user_id = pu.user_id left join sys_user ru on t.receive_user_id = ru.user_id where t.del_flag = '0' AND t.publish_user_id = #{publishUserId} order by t.create_time desc limit 5

select l.leave_id, l.leave_title, l.leave_type, l.leave_status, l.leave_days, l.start_time, l.end_time, l.create_time, au.nick_name as applicant_user_name, ad.dept_name as applicant_dept_name from campus_leave_apply l left join sys_user au on l.applicant_user_id = au.user_id left join sys_dept ad on au.dept_id = ad.dept_id where l.del_flag = '0' AND l.approver_user_id = #{approverUserId} order by l.create_time desc limit 5

select l.leave_id, l.leave_title, l.leave_type, l.leave_status, l.leave_days, l.start_time, l.end_time, l.create_time, au.nick_name as applicant_user_name, ad.dept_name as applicant_dept_name from campus_leave_apply l left join sys_user au on l.applicant_user_id = au.user_id left join sys_dept ad on au.dept_id = ad.dept_id where l.del_flag = '0' and l.leave_status = '0' AND l.approver_user_id = #{approverUserId} order by l.create_time desc limit 10

select c.comment_id, c.task_id, c.comment_content, c.create_time, cu.nick_name as comment_user_name, cu.avatar as comment_user_avatar from campus_task_comment c left join sys_user cu on c.comment_user_id = cu.user_id left join campus_task t on c.task_id = t.task_id where c.del_flag = '0' and t.del_flag = '0' AND t.publish_user_id = #{publishUserId} order by c.create_time desc limit 5
